title: Asynchronous Event Generation
scenario: Write a JavaScript function that simulates an asynchronous event loop. The function should take a list of tasks as input and return a new list that includes the results of each task in the order they were executed. The function should handle asynchronous tasks using a callback function and should be able to handle edge cases such as an empty list or a task that fails to execute. Limit the output to 150 lines.

evaluationCriteria.description: Verify that the code is syntactically correct.
Verify that the function works correctly for different inputs.
Evaluate the readability and maintainability of the code.
